positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~spills_lot_food(peter)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~cleanly(peter)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~notably_tidy(X0) | ~spills_lot_food(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~cleanly(X0) | notably_tidy(X0)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~notably_tidy(peter)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define clumsy_foodie(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define values_order_spotlessness(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define family_prioritizes_order(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
